description: Ecogas Inversiones S.A., through its subsidiaries, engages in the distribution of natural gas to residential and commercial customers in Argentina. It serves 1,399,777 customers through an infrastructure of 35,842 km of networks and gas pipelines. The company was formerly known as Inversora de Gas del Centro S.A. Ecogas Inversiones S.A. was incorporated in 1992 and is based in Buenos Aires, Argentina.
